# Pratyush Tripathy

> Personal portfolio of Pratyush Tripathy — Class 11 student, researcher, content writer and AI enthusiast based in Patna, India.

Pratyush Tripathy is a student researcher with award-winning science projects, AI explorations, content writing samples and student leadership experience. This site collects his projects, achievements, services and contact information.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Portfolio with hero, about, education, achievements, skills, services, projects, work samples, leadership, testimonials and contact.

## Guides

- [AI in Smart Farming](/guides/ai-in-smart-farming): Technical guide on how AI can be used in smart farming, with the Smart Farm project as a case study.
